claim: Isomiso esisha esenzeka eSpain sambula isikhumbuzo esidala seminyaka engu-7 000 ubudala, esidala kunamaphiramidi aseGibhithe.

Eminyakeni yamuva, isikhumbuzo sivele ngokugcwele ngo-2019 nango-2022 ... ... noma kunjalo, isikhumbuzo sagcwala ngo-2025  lapho okuthunyelwe mayelana nesikhumbuzo kwaphinda kwabelwana ngakho  futhi isikhumbuzo asikaveli. Isikhumbuzo se-megalithic esidala kunamaphiramidi aseGibhithe ne-Stonehenge yaseNgilandi asanda kuvela emanzini aseSpain njengoba isomiso sihlasela izwe, ngokusho kwehleko elisakazeke ngoJulayi 2025. claim: Abantu baseNigeria abahlala emadolobheni ngesikhathi sokuzimela babeyizigidi ezingu-7.
evidence: Ngokuphawulekayo, ohulumeni bezingxenye balawula izindleko zomphakathi ezivela emalini engenayo eqoqwe esifundeni ngasinye. Ngo-1960, iNigeria yanikezwa ukuzimela kwezepolitiki njengombuso onobukhosi ngaphansi koMthethosisekelo ka-1960 owawunikeza uhlelo lukahulumeni lwephalamende, izifunda ezi-3 (iNyakatho, iMpumalanga neNtshonalanga), uhlaka lwezomthetho olunezingxenye ezimbili e-federal (iSenate neNdlu yabameli) kanye nezinga lesifunda (iNdlu yeSigungu neNdlu yabaHulumeni) ngamandla kahulumeni abekwe ezinhlotsheni ezintathu noma ohlwini  okukhethekile, okuhambisanayo nokuseleyo. UDkt Nnamdi Azikiwe wamiswa njengoMbusi-Jikelele we-federation futhi uTafawa Balewa waqhubeka ekhonza njengenhloko yephalamende elikhethwe ngentando yeningi, kodwa manje elibusayo, uhulumeni. Kusukela ngo-1960, iNigeria ibilokhu izwe elizimele ngokuphelele futhi izwe elinabantu abahlala kulo.

IHallmark ithi kuwebhusayithi yayo ukuthi i-Hallmark i-Mahony "iyinketho enkulu kunazo zonke yamakhadi atholakalayo kubathengi base-Afrika baseMelika". Kwakungacaci ngesikhathi sokubhala lokhu ukuthi iWalgreens yaqala nini ukuthenga amakhadi omkhiqizo weMahony. Izimangalo eziku-inthanethi ngo-Agasti 2025 zithi iWalgreens "iqale" ukuthengisa amakhadi. IHallmark yasungula umkhiqizo ngo-1991, ngokusho kwewebhusayithi yayo. Ngo-Agasti 2025, kwavela isimangalo (sesaba) online sokuthi iWalgreens iqale umugqa wamakhadi wokubhula kuphela kubantu base-Hall

evidence: UMongameli wayephikisana nezinombolo zakhe eziningi, kuhlanganise nokuthi ukunyuka kwemali kwafinyelela ezingeni eliphansi kakhulu eminyakeni emithathu ngo-Agasti 2025, izinsiza zangaphandle zasezingeni eliphezulu kakhulu kusukela ngo-2019 nokuthi amaNigeria ayizigidi eziyizinkulungwane ezingu-330 ahlinzekwa emakhaya ayizigidi ezingu-8 ngaphansi koHlelo Lwezwe Lokutshalwa Kwezimali Kwezenhlalo. Nokho, ezinye izimangalo zazilahlekisa, njengokuqhathanisa ukukhula kwe-GDP kwekota kwenyanga nezinkomba zonyaka nokuqhathanisa ukuthekelisa okungekho ngaphansi kukawoyela nakho konke ukuthekelisa okungekho ngaphansi kukawoyela. Isimangalo esikhulu esingalungile sikaTinubu sasikuthi uhulumeni wakhe wanciphisa isilinganiso senkonzo yemali engenayo-esikweletu eNigeria sisuka ku-97% siye ngaphansi kuka-50%. Asikwazanga nokuthola ubufakazi bokuthi izimangalo zakhe zithi abasebenzi abangu-153,000 bazuza ohlelweni lwemali olungu-N30 billion.

claim: EMinnesota, abanikazi bezibhamu abanamalayisense bavunyelwe ukuphatha isikhali esithwele ngesikhathi sokubonisa umbhikisho.
evidence: Ngemva kokudubula kuka-Alex Pretti oneminyaka engu-37 ubudala, ngezikhali ezishaywayo, nge-Border Patrol agqugquzela noma yiluphi uhlobo lokuxwayisa oluthandayo. evidence: Ngenxa yesimo senqubo yokubambisana uSagan noDruyan ababhalisa ngayo, akunakwenzeka ukubona umbhali oyedwa wesitatimende. evidence: Ividiyo ethi ibonisa i-Royal Bengal Tiger ihamba ehlathini laseMankar eMpumalanga Burdwan iyavela ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Isiqeshana sabelwa njengento esanda kubonwa eNtshonalanga Bengal. claim: Ngo-August 2025, ochwepheshe baxwayisa ngokuthi "izimpongo zikaFrankenstein" ezithelelaniswe nezimpondo noma izimpondo ebusweni bazo ezibonwe eFort Collins, eColorado, "ziye zahlasela" i-United States.
evidence: Ngokuphambene nokuthunyelwa kwezokuxhumana okuthusa ukwesaba, ukusabalala kwaleli gciwane akuyona into entsha futhi onogwaja abanegciwane "abangenisi" i-United States. Leli gciwane alibangeli usongo kwezinye izinhlobo zezilwane, kuhlanganise nabantu. Ngo-Agasti 2025, abantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana baqala ukuchaza isimo esizwakala sengathi yifilimu yesabekayo eyaba ngokoqobo. "Izazi Zixwayisa Ngogwaja abanegciwane 'iFrankenstein' abane-Tentacles Ehlasela i-US. Lezi zimpukane zasendle ziye zabonwa zigxuma ngezingxenye zobuso ezinenkohlakalo eFort Collins, eColorado", kusho okuthunyelwe okukodwa (okufaka i-XMA) okubhalwe ngaphezu kwe-1 million ukubukwa. "Ngo-August 2025, abantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana baqala ukuchaza isimo esizwakala sengathi yifilimu esethusayo esenziwe yaba ngokoqobo".

claim: I-snow globe yokuqala yakhiwa ngengozi ngenkathi othile ezama ukwakha ukukhanya okukhanyayo.
evidence: Mayelana nalokhu kulinganiswa u-Erwin Perzy I, umshini wezinsimbi zokuhlinzwa eVienna, wayezama nge-glass globe egcwele amanzi cishe ngo-1900 ukuze akhulise ukukhanya lapho kunezinhlayiya ezingeziwe ezihamba njengeqhwa. Umphumela "weqhwa" ubonakala sengathi wawungenandaba, futhi kamuva waphendukela lo mbono waba yi-snowball yesitayela se-souvenir. Ingozi kaPerzy yayingeyona isibonelo sokuqala esaziwayo sale nkinga. Umbiko kahulumeni wase-US ngo-1878 eParis Universal Exposition wachaza amaphepha amakhulu enziwe ngamabhola engilazi agcwele amanzi ahlanzekile akhiqiza umphumela we-snowstorm lapho ephenduka. Sekuyiminyaka umbiko usakazwa ku-inthanethi wokuthi i-snowball yokuqala yasungulwa ngephutha.Ngokulandelana, uchwepheshe waseViennese wazama ukuletha ukukhanya okucwebezelayo futhi wabona ukuthi amanzi e-snowballsphere egcwele ama-sphere ayefana ne-snowballsphere.

claim: Ukuhlaselwa komoya kwe-US e-Iran s Fordow nuclear facility
evidence: Phakathi nengxabano yase-Iran-Israel, ividiyo ethi ibonisa ukuhlaselwa kombuso womoya kwe-US esikhungweni senjini yenuzi yase-Iran iFordow isakazeka kakhulu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Indaba ebonakalayo (inguqulo yesiNgisi: Izolo ebusuku, ngemuva kokuhlaselwa kombuso womoya wase-US, indawo esikhungweni senjini yenuzi ebalulekile yase-Iran, iFordow..!!) claim: Izikhulu zokhetho zaseGeorgia zivumile ukuthi zaqinisekisa ama-ballots okhetho luka-2020 nge-tabulator tape  efana namarisidi  angavunyelwe abasebenzi bezinketho ngokwephula imithetho yokhetho yezwe laseGeorgia.
evidence: Mayelana naleso simo, uNobhala Wezwe waseGeorgia uBrad Raffensperger wakhipha isitatimende esithi lesi sigameko asizange sithinte umphumela wokhetho. NgoDisemba 2025, kwavela umbiko ku-inthanethi wokuthi izikhulu zokhetho esifundazweni saseGeorgia iFulton County zavuma ukufakaza amavoti okuqala angalandelwa izinqubo ezifanele zokulandela ukhetho lukaMongameli wase-US luka-2020 olwaluhlanganisa iDemocrat Joe Biden neRepublican Donald Trump. Abasebenzisi kumawebhusayithi ezinkundla zokuxhumana afana ne-X (e-archived) ne-Facebook (e-archived,archived) babelana ngaleso sitatimende, abanye bethi iphutha enkombeni yenza amavoti "akhohlisiwe" futhi ngenxa yalokho lathinta imiphumela ebikiwe.Ngokwezibalo zeFulton County's Election Day, uBiden wathola amavoti angu-381,144, noma ama-72% emiphumela yesifundazwe, aya ku-137,240 e-tollington, kusuka kumavoti angu-525,659.

claim: UMike Johnson, uSomlomo weNdlu yabameli, wayengumshumayeli wesikole sezomthetho esibizwa ngeJaji uPaul Pressler kamuva owasolwa ngokuhlukunyezwa ngokocansi, kodwa leso sikole asizange siqale ukusebenza ngokusemthethweni.
evidence: Mayelana naleso simo Ngo-Okthoba 2025, kwavela umbiko ku-intanethi wokuthi uSpika we-US House of Representatives, uMike Johnson, wake wakhonza njengomshana wesikole somthetho esingakaze sivulwe.Lokhu kusolwa kwaveza ukuthi uJohnson wayengumshana iminyaka emibili eJaji Paul Pressler School of Law, eliqanjwe ngegama lomholi ophakeme eNingizimu Baptist Convention owabekwa icala lokuhlukunyezwa ngokocansi.Abasebenzisi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ezifana neBlueSky (okufakiwe),X (okufakiwe) kanye ne-Facebook (okufakiwe) basakaza umbiko, behlanganyela isithombe sikaJohnson nombhalo othi, "Isikole somthetho lapho uMike Johnson ayengumshana khona iminyaka emi-2 futhi engakaze abe nabafundi sasibizwa ngokuthi iJaji Paul Pressler School of Law.

claim: Owayengumphathi we-Australia uRicky Ponting wabiza i-India ngokuthi i-perpetual sore loser ngenxa yokungaphuthi izandla nePakistan ngemuva komdlalo we-Asia Cup.

claim: Umshayeli we-truck ubonwe epheka ngaphakathi kwemoto yakhe ngaphambi nje kokuba kwenzeke ingozi ebulalayo emgwaqeni omkhulu i-10 e-Ontario, eCalifornia.
evidence: Umshayeli weloli oneminyaka engu-21 ubudala odabuka eNdiya, owaziwa ngokuthi uJashanpreet Singh, waboshwa ngesonto eledlule ngokushaya i-semi-truck yakhe ezimotweni eziningi ku-10 Freeway e-Ontario, eCalifornia, okubulale abantu abathathu. Ividiyo isivele iya ngokuya ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, okusho ukuthi uSing ekheka ngaphakathi kwemoto yakhe ngaphambi kokushayisana. Abasebenzisi abahlanganyela isiqeshana bathi umshayeli wayepheka i-curry ngesikhathi kwenzeka ingozi. Isikrini esivela ku-X post ngu @TodaysNewsco Call Funda futhi: Ingabe u-Amit Shah Amabutho aseNdiya 'Umbutho WamaHindu' Ubufakazi A search keyword across the main US media outlet enikeze imibiko ethembekile ekhuluma ngokuthi umshayeli weloli wayekheka ngaphambi kwengxabano. Akukho neyodwa yezindawo ezisemthethweni eye yaletha isigaba "sokuphaka" esijikeleza online. Isikrini-by-frame-rabhu isiqophi esikhishwe ku-X video esikhishwe yi-TodaysNewsco.

claim: I-National Lok Adalat kazwelonke ehlelelwe umhlaka 13 Disemba 2025 izohlinzeka ngezaphulelo ezinkulu ezimweni ezibhekene nezingqinamba zomgwaqo.
evidence: Izithuba eziningana (lapha, lapha) ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ziya ngokuya zisakazeka, zithi i-National Lok Adalat kazwelonke ngoDisemba 13, 2025 izonikeza abashayeli ithuba elikhulu lokuxazulula izinkinga zomgwaqo ezisalindile ngezinketho ezihlukahluka kusuka kuma-50% kuya kuma-100%, kuye ngokuthi isimo. Izifundazwe ezisho ukuthi zifakiwe yiDelhi, Haryana, Punjab, Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, Gujarat, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Karnataka, Rajasthan naseNtshonalanga Bengal. Amawebhusayithi amaningi wezindaba nezindlu zabezindaba ezaziwayo nazo zibike okufanayo (lapha, lapha). Ngalesi sihloko, ake sihlole iqiniso elifakiwe kulezicelo. Inguqulo egciniwe yale post ingatholakala lapha. Isimangalo: I-Loklat Lok Lok Adalat kazwelonke ehlelelwe umhlaka-13 kuDisemba 2025 izohlinzeka ngezinketho zomgwaqo ezisalindile. Nokho, iqiniso: I-Loklat Lok Adalat Kazwelonke ka-2025 ehlelelwe umhlaka-13 kuDisemba 2025 ayitholakali ngezinketho

claim: Indoda engumSulumane eyahlaselwa owesifazane endaweni yokudlela eNdiya

Isiqeshana sabelwa ngephutha lokuthi indoda engumSulumane yathatha owesifazane waya endaweni yokudlela, yamhlasela lapho enqaba ukumlandela ehhotela, nokuthi kamuva wamvikela lapho kufika amaphoyisa. Umsebenzisi we-Facebook uthumele okuthunyelwe okuyi-viral ngephutha elilandelayo: "Ngobusuku obubodwa edayiswa e-Dhabe ukuze kuhambiswe ihhotela", intombazane yathi izolo i-jihadi yahlasela. Intombazane yayisivele ihlanze ubuchopho intombazane eyagcina i-jihadi futhi yaya emaphoyiseni ukuze iyisindise.

Azikho izindlela zokwelapha zomdlavuza eziqinisekisiwe. claim: Ungathumela i-SMS ku-50409 ukuze usayine isicelo sokutshela usephalamende wakho ukuba angahambi esikhundleni sikaRuth Bader Ginsberg eNkantolo Ephakeme kuze kube ngemva kokhetho luka-2020
evidence: Thumela igama elithi resist ku-Resistbot ku-Apple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, noma ngomyalezo ku-50409 bese uphendula imibuzo ephendulwayo. Kungakapheli nemizuzu, uzobe uxhumane neCongress noma ezinye iziphathimandla zakho ezikhethiwe. Vula incwadi yakho ukuze uthole umphumela omkhulu. Izinga lomyalezo nedatha lingahle lisebenze uma usebenzisa i-SMS. Ukuphindaphinda komyalezo kuyahluka. Ukuyeka komyalezo ku-50409 ukumisa yonke imiyalezo. Usizo lomyalezo ku-50409 ukuthola usizo. Bheka imigomo yethu yokusebenzisa, isaziso sobumfihlo, kanye nomqulu wamalungelo womsebenzisi.

claim: Ngo-September 2025, okuthunyelwe kwezokuxhumana kwabonisa ngokuqinisekile inothi elivela kummeli u-Alan Dershowitz elibhekisela ekuhlanganisweni kweVanity Fair ku-albhamu kaJeffrey Epstein yokuzalwa kwe-50.
evidence: Ngo-September 2025, abantu ezinkundleni zokuxhumana babelane ngenothi lommeli u-Alan Dershowitz okwakuthiwa liyingxenye ye-albhamu yemilayezo yomxhumanisi ohlazekile uJeffrey Epstein ngosuku lwakhe lokuzalwa lwama-50 ngo-2003.U-Epstein, okwakuthiwa wayehlobene nabantu abaningi abavelele, wabulala ukuphila kwakhe ejele ngo-2019 ngesikhathi elindele ukuqulwa kwecala lokuthengiswa kwezocansi.Ngo-September 8, i-U.S. House Oversight Committee yabiza u-Dersstein ngemibhalo ehlukahlukene ephathelene nomenzi wobubi bezocansi.U-Dersho wathi abasebenzisi bezokuxhumana nabantu ababhekiswe kuye babethunyelwe ekhasini likaHarvard Fairstein eVancouver.UVancouver Law uthe uDershowitz wakhonza njengeluleki weqembu lomongameli we-Weinstein, futhi wakhonza njengomeluleki we-Institute of the United States, kanye noHarvey Epstein.

claim: Indiza ye-Air India AI 315 yathola umlilo lapho ifika eDelhi, abagibeli bephephile
evidence: I-Vishvas News, ekuphenyweni kwayo, yathola ukuthi isithombe esithinta amagciwane asikaze sivele, kodwa sivela esenzakalweni esedlule. Isithombe sibonisa umlilo owaqhuma enjini yendiza ye-Air India Express eya eKochie esikhumulweni sezindiza iMuscat. Nokho, manje sekwabiwa ngamanga njengesenzo esisha somlilo endizeni ye-Air India esikhumulweni sezindiza iDelhi. eNew Delhi (i-Vishvas News). Kwaqhuma umlilo e-unit yamandla asizayo yendiza ye-Air India esikhumulweni sezindiza iDelhi. Ingozi yenzeke ngesikhathi indiza ihamba. Bonke abagibeli nabasebenzi baphephile. Manje, ngokuhambisana nalokhu, isithombe siyaba yi-viral ezinkundleni zokuxhumana esivela esigabeni sangaphambili sendiza. Abanye abantu nabo babonakala emi eduze. Abasebenzisi bathi lesi sithombe sakamu sesisha futhi sibonisa umlilo endizeni endala ye-AI-315 eseDelhi.

claim: Ekuthumeleni i-imeyili nomlingani wakhe uGhislaine Maxwell okukhishwe yiKomiti Yokwengamela Yendlu ngoNovemba 2025, umenzi wobubi bobulili uJeffrey Epstein wabiza uMongameli wase-US uDonald Trump ngokuthi "yinja engakaze ibhale" futhi wathi uTrump wachitha amahora amaningi necala lokuhweba ngocansi ekhaya lika-Epstein.

claim: Ungathumela i-SMS ku-50409 ukuze usayine isicelo sokutshela usephalamende wakho ukuba angahambi esikhundleni sikaRuth Bader Ginsberg eNkantolo Ephakeme kuze kube ngemva kokhetho luka-2020
evidence: Thumela igama elithi ukumelana ne-Resistbot ku-Apple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, noma ngomyalezo ku-50409 bese uphendula imibuzo ephendulwayo.Ngemizuzu embalwa, uzobe uxhumane neCongress noma ezinye izikhulu zakho ezikhethiwe.Vula incwadi yakho ukuze uthole umphumela omkhulu. ... Awudingi ukuthola abameleli bakho kuqala, i-Resistbot izokwenzela wena. Ingase ibhale incwadi yakho ngenombolo yomthethosivivinywa noma isihloko sezindaba, noma ungathayipha incwadi ngokwakho.

claim: UNancy Pelosi uthi iChina ingathanda uJoe Biden.
evidence: I-Intel: I-Russia isebenza ukunqoba uBiden; i-China ne-Iran bakhetha i-US Trump kunokuhlula i-Russia isebenza ngenkuthalo "ukudelela" umqashi kaDemocratic ozongenela umongameli uJoe Biden, kanti i-China ibheka uMongameli uDonald Trump "njengokungalindelekile" futhi ikhetha ukuthi angabi nalo ukhetho, ngokusho kokuhlolwa okusha kobuchwepheshe base-US.Ukuhlaziywa, okukhishwe ngoLwesihlanu ngumholi weNational Counter-Intelligence and Security Center, kuphetha nokuthi i-Iran isebenza ukukhuthaza ukwahlukana nokwephula uTrump ngaphambi kokhetho luka-2020. "Izisusa zeTehran zokwenza imisebenzi enjalo, ngokwengxenye, zikhuthazwa umbono wokuthi ukhetho lukaMongameli Trump luzobangela ukuqhubeka kwengcindezi yase-US e-Iran", kuphetha ukuhlaziywa, futhi kwengeza ukuthi ukwesatshiswa ukuthi uhulumeni kaTrump uzoshintshwa umbuso.

claim: Cishe u-40% wabo bonke abasebenzi basemapulazini e-US bangabokufika abangenayo imibhalo.
evidence: Mayelana nalesi simo Ngokwezibalo zakamuva ezikhona ezivela ku-USDA, cishe ama-40% wabasebenzi basemapulazini abaqashiwe  labo abasebenza ngezithelo, imifino kanye nokusanhlamvu, ngokwesibonelo  babengayena imvume esemthethweni yokusebenza e-United States phakathi kuka-2020 no-2022. Izibalo ezingama-40% zeminyaka ka-2020-2022 azizange zihlanganise abasebenzi bezokulima abasebenza okwesikhashana ngaphansi kwesimo esithile sokufuduka okusemthethweni  futhi azizange zihlanganise abasebenzi bezokulima bezinkomo noma bezobisi. Izibalo zika-2023 nangemva kwalokho zazingekho ngesikhathi sokubhala lesi sihloko. Ekuqaleni kuka-2025, abasebenzisi bezokuxhumana baqala ukwabelana ngesimangalo sokuthi cishe ama-40% wabo bonke abasebenzi basemapulazini base-US babengabasebenzi abangaqashiwe. Izithuba ku-X, Reddit naku-Facebook zacaphuna izibalo ezishoyo. Omunye wathi, ngokwesibonelo, "okungenani ama-40% wabasebenzi basemapulazini baseMelika babengaqashiwe".

claim: Isimangalo esisakazeka kakhulu sibonisa ukuthi u-Ajit Doval wanxusa amaNdiya ukuba asuse i-Amazon ukuze acindezele i-US empini yamatariji.
evidence: Umdwebo obonisa isitatimende okuthiwa sika-Ajit Doval, uMeluleki Wezokuphepha Kazwelonke, esikhuthaza amaNdiya ukuthi asuse uhlelo lokusebenza lwe-Amazon njengendlela yokucindezela u-United States ngemali empini yamatariji eqhubekayo uye waba yi-viral ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Lesi sitatimende sibonisa ukuthi ukubhikishwa okukhulu kwepulatifomu kuzothinta kakhulu izintshisekelo zaseMelika. Ake sithole ukuthi u-Ajit Doval wenza ngempela yini lesi sitatimende. Okushiwo ngenhla kungabonakala lapha. (I-Archive) NM VERIFIED NewsMobile iqinisekisile lesi sitatimende futhi yathola ukuthi isithombe esivelayo sasilahlekisa. Ithimba le-NM laqala ukuqinisekisa kwayo ngokufuna isitatimende esivelayo esivelayo ku-Ajit Doval maqondana ne-Amazon kanye nempi ye-Amazon okuthiwa i-target war. Isitatimende esivelayo ukuthi amaNdiya anganikeza i-US inzuzo enkulu ngokususwa kwe-Amazon kusuka kumakhalekhukhwini yawo.

claim: Umlingisi uChristian Bale wakha izindlu ezingu-12 edolobhaneni elingu-$22 million ePalmdale, eCalifornia, okuhloswe ngalo ukugcina abafowabo nodadewabo abasemakhaya okuhlala kuwo ndawonye.
evidence: Mayelana nalesi simo NgoJuni 2025, kwavela isimangalo (esifakiwe) ku-intanethi sokuthi umlingisi we-Batman uChristian Bale wakha izindlu eziyi-12 edolobhaneni elingu-$22 million ePalmdale, eCalifornia, elalinomgomo wokugcina abafowabo nodadewabo ndawonye emphakathini wokunakekelwa. Isimangalo esisodwa esithandwayo se-Facebook sasifundeka kanje: "UChristian Bale Ukwakha Izindlu Ezi-12 Zokunakekela Abafowabo Emphakathini Wokunakekela Abantwana Kanye Ngaphansi Kophahla Olufanayo". Isimangalo sasakazwa ku-X (esifakiwe), ku-Instagram (esifakiwe) naku-Bluesky (esifakiwe), lapho okuthunyelwe kwafaka khona izindleko ezihloswe ukuthi zingama-$22 million zokuthuthukisa.Abafundi be-Snopes baphinde basesha isiza sethu ukuthola eminye imininingwane mayelana naleso zindaba.Isimangalo esithokozisayo siyiqiniso. futhi i-Together California, inhlangano esekelwe umlingisi; umkakhe, uSibi; kanye ne-University of California, eLos Angeles

claim: UNgqongqoshe Wezangaphandle wase-Afghanistan u-Amir Khan Muttaqi umemezele izinhlelo zokwakha amathempeli amaHindu eKabul naseKandahar ngosizo lwezezimali oluvela eNdiya.
evidence: UNgqongqoshe wezangaphandle waseNdiya, u-Amir Khan Muttaqi, usanda kuvakashela eNdiya futhi wahlangana noNgqongqoshe Wezangaphandle waseNdiya uS Jaishankar, ngemuva kwalokho ividiyo evela enkomfeni yakhe yabezindaba yavela ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. Kule clip eyaba yi-viral, uMutaqi uzwakala ethi ngesiHindi, "Ngatshele uNdunankulu waseNdiya uNarendra Modi ukuthi uma usisiza ngamadola ambalwa, sizokwakha amathempeli kaNkosi uShiva noVishnu eKabul naseKandahar Afghanistan. Khona-ke abaqotho abavela eNdiya bazokwazi ukwenza ama-pilgrim e-Afghanistan. Siphakamise lapha isisho esithi 'Jai Shri Ram'.Siyabonga kuModiji ngokuma eceleni kwethu. "Ethumela leyo vidiyo ku-Facebook, umsebenzisi wabhala, "Ukuqhekeka: UMengameli Wezangaphandle wase-Afghanistan Mutaqqi umemezela ukuthi i-Afghanistan manje isilungele ukuvula amathempeli-vorshi ngaphakathi kwe-Afghanistan ukuze uthole imali".

claim: Wonke umuntu angafinyelela umuthi wokugoma i-COVID-19.
evidence: Lapho uNgqongqoshe Wezempilo wase-US uRobert F. Kennedy Jr. efakaza phambi kweKomidi Lezezimali LeSenate ngo-September 4, abaseningi bamgxeka ngokunciphisa umuthi wokugoma i-COVID-19 ngemuva kokuthembisa ngoNovemba ukuthi ngeke "athathe noma yimaphi ama-vaccine". "Ingabe ubambe uphawu olukhulu oluthi ubuqamba amanga lapho usho lokho?" kubuza uKennedy uSenator Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass. Ngo-August 27, i-US Food and Drug Administration yavuselela imihlahlandlela yayo yokugoma i-COVID-19, ikhawulela amaqembu abantu abavunyelwe ukuthola umuthi wokuvimbela i-COVID-6 noma ngaphezulu nanoma ngubani oneminyaka engu-6 nangaphezulu onesifo esisodwa esiyimbangela eyandisa ingozi yokutheleleka yi-COVID-19.

claim: Amaski obuso abangela i-hypoxia.

claim: Okuqukethwe kwenethiwekhi yomngcwabo, iRadio Quebec, ephethwe ngu-Alexis Cossette-Trudel kuvinjelwe yi-Facebook.

claim: Ngesikhathi sokubamba kwabezindaba ku-Air Force One, uMongameli wase-US uDonald Trump wathi "Kuthula, piggy!" kumlobi owayebuza ngokukhishwa kwamafayela kaJeffrey Epstein.
evidence: Mayelana naleso simo NgoNovemba 2025, i-US House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform yakhipha imibhalo engaphezu kuka-20 000 ephathelene nesiphambuki socansi uJeffrey Epstein, kuhlanganise nama-imeyili aya futhi avela ku-akhawunti yakhe exoxa ngoMongameli Donald Trump, owayenobudlelwano obude iminyaka eminingi nomxhumanisi oswelekile. Ngesikhathi elinde ukuvota kweNdlu yeNdlu yoMthethosisekelo mayelana nomthethosivivinywa ophoqa uMnyango wezobulungiswa ukuba ukhiphe lokho okubizwa ngokuthi amafayela ka-Epstein, abantu abaningi bacabanga ngalokho u-Epstein ayekwazi ngoTrump.

claim: Amathambo kaSanta Nicholas, okuyisikhuthazo sikaSanta Claus, ayevuza uketshezi iminyaka engu-1 700.
evidence: Ngokuphathelene nalolu hlu, abakhulekeli baqala ukuqoqa uketshezi oluyimfihlakalo oluvela ethuneni likaSanta Nicholas ngokushesha nje ngemva kokufa kwakhe maphakathi neminyaka yama-300, noma eminyakeni engaba ngu-1 700 edlule. Kunembile ukusho ukuthi uketshezi luvela ethuneni likaSanta Nicholas hhayi amathambo akhe ngqo, njengoba kungacaci kahle ukuthi yini, ngqo, evuza ethuneni. Njengoba ososayensi beye banquma ukuthi uketshezi lwaluyamanzi, kungenzeka ukuthi luvela ethuneni. Ngesikhathi seKhisimusi ka-2025, abasebenzisi bezokuxhumana bezenhlalo basakaza isimangalo esibonakala silungele kangcono i-Halloween: Amathambo kaSanta Nicholas  isikhuthazo sikaSanta Claus  kuthiwa ayevuza "uketshezi olucacile, olufana namanzi" iminyaka engu-1700 edlule.

claim: Ukuzila ukudla kubulala amangqamuzana omdlavuza ngezinsuku eziyi-15
evidence: I-Quick In a Facebook video, isimangalo sithi uma kwenzeka kutholakala ukuthi unesifo somdlavuza, uzokuzila ukudla izinsuku ezingu-15 ngoba ukholelwa ukuthi ukuzila ukudla kubulala amangqamuzana omdlavuza. I-Fact Check Ingabe ukuzila ukudla kuvimbela umdlavuza ezinsukwini ezingu-15 ngemuva kokuthola isifo? Cha. Abukho ubufakazi bemitholampilo bokuthi ukuzila ukudla kulapha umdlavuza ezinsukwini ezingu-15 noma nhlobo. Umdlavuza akuyona isifo esisodwa. Ihlanganisa izimo ezingaphezu kuka-200 ezahlukene, ngasinye sinobhayoloji obuhlukile, amaphethini okukhula, nezimpendulo ekwelapheni. Ezinye izifo zikhula ngokushesha; zikhula kancane. U-Israyeli ubike ukuthi ulimaze izakhiwo ezinkulu zenuzi kanye nezikhungo zempi, kubulawe abaholi abaningi abaphezulu bezempi base-Iran. Ukuziphindiselela, i-Iran yathumela uchungechunge lwezikhali zemikhumbi ne-drones ku-Israyeli ngaphansi kwegama elithi Operation True Promise 3. Phakathi nalokhu kuqina, izithombe eziningana ziyasakazeka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, okushiwo ukuthi zivela empini eqhubekayo. Ake siqinisekise iqiniso ngalezi zithombe kulesi sihloko. Isimangalo: Izithombe zangempela ezivela empini eqhubekayo kaJuni 2025Iran. Iqiniso: Lezi zithombe ze-Israel azibonisi izithombe zangempela ezivela empini eqhubekayo ye-IsraelIran. claim: I-Italy ayivumelanga ukuthi ama-SSU ahambe neqembu lase-Ukraine emidlalweni yama-Olimpiki.
evidence: I-Italy ithi kuthiwa ayivumelanga i-Ukraine ukuthumela abasebenzi be-Security Service of Ukraine abangu-120 ukuba bahambe neqembu lesizwe kuma-Olimpiki ka-2026; iphinde ithi uMnyango Wezemidlalo wase-Italy ukhiphe impendulo, wabiza lesi sicelo ngokuthi asamukeleki futhi wagcizelela ilungelo lezakhamizi zase-Ukraine lokukhululeka kokuhamba. Nokho, lokhu kungamanga. I-Reuters ayizange ishicilele ividiyo enjalo. UMnyango Wezemidlalo wase-Italy awuzange wenze izitatimende ezinjalo. Isikrini sokuthunyelwe i-Reuters asizange sishicilele ividiyo enjalo kuwebhusayithi yayo esemthethweni, noma ku-Instagram, Facebook, YouTube noma ku-X. Abashushisi bazame ukulingisa isitayela sokuqala samavidiyo. Nokho, abasebenzisi be-Reuters abazenzisi abasebenzisi uphawu lwe-outlet, kuyilapho isithombe sokuthunyelwe esenziwe ngesandla sangakwesokunxele. Isikrini esenziwe nge-Reuters asishicileli ividiyo ye-Olimpiki ye-Italy.

evidence: Izinga lokungaqashwa e-Edo State sehle lisuka kuma-25,1 ekhulwini ngekota yesithathu ka-2018 laya kuma-19 ekhulwini ngekota yesibili ka-2020, ngokusho kwedatha entsha ekhishwe yi-Nigeria Bureau of Statistics (NBS).Lokhu kwehla okungu-6,1 ekhulwini kubangelwa ukuhola ukudalwa kwemisebenzi kuhulumeni kaGovernor Godwin Obaseki, okucatshangwa ukuthi i-Edo State Skills Development Agency (EdoJobs) edala imisebenzi engaphezu kuka-170,000 ngezinhlelo ezintsha eminyakeni emithathu nengxenye edlule.Ngokusho kombiko we-NBS, i-Edo State inenani eliphansi kakhulu lokungaqashwa esifundeni esiseNingizimu, ithuthukisa ezinye izifundazwe ezinhlanu ezicebile ngophethiloli esifundeni.  Izinga lokungaqashwa phakathi kwezifundazwe eziseNingizimu-Ningizimu lilandelayo: i-Akwa-I 45.2%; i-Baybom 27.8%; 31.6%; i-Rivers Delta 40.3%, i-Edo State 19.7%, ne-Edo Cross 42.7%, kusho umbiko.
